name: Booster Shield
description: Booster Shields, most often made by Dahl, can spawn shield booster pickups when you take hits. Grabbing a booster replenishes a portion of your shield, helping you stay topped up during longer firefights where steady incoming damage keeps boosters appearing.
notes: Boosters are temporary and will shrink and vanish, so you need to move to collect them quickly. In co-op, their value depends on which player is able to pick up the drops when they appear.

special.description: When damaged, may drop booster batteries that restore shield capacity when collected.
